x-enumeration-literals.name: Eligibility Criteria
x-enumeration-literals.description: Defines who can participate (e.g., age, residency, customer status).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Qualifying Conditions
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Outlines the specific actions or behaviors required to earn the incentive.
- Minimum balance
- Monthly deposits
- Limited withdrawals
- Use of linked services (e.g., debit card, bill pay)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Structure
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Describes the type of reward:
- Cash bonus
- Interest rate boost
- Cashback
- Loyalty/reward points
Specifies how and when rewards are paid (e.g., monthly, quarterly, at maturity).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Timeframes and Duration
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Sets the validity period of the arrangement.
- Start and end dates
- Time needed to meet conditions
- Duration for which incentive applies

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: An arrangement which specifies to charge fees when banking transactions did take place, accompanied by the modalities to calculate and charge the fees and the related terms and conditions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Setttlement Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Arrangements (obligations and rights) to do the settlement of transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Redemption Arrangement
x-enumeration-literals.description: A Redemption Arrangement is an agreed commitment to validate redemption requests, confirm eligibility and available incentive balances, apply applicable fees or conditions, and fulfill or reverse the redemption of accrued incentives
